note: i.MX8 anti-theft/tracking service. 3-state machine (0=OFF,1=AUTO,2=THEFT) published retained on tracking/state. Triggers: IMU movement (ux/alarm/state==3 -> AUTO), SMS (modem/sms: enabled->THEFT, disabled->OFF, locate->ux/sound/play), cellular polling (cell_locator). Stripped; mapped via common_logf per-module source path. See main/docs/tracking.md.

named_functions.0x00107c60: tracking_main  // Process entry (main.cpp). Builds the tracking-service context, constructs the Movement/IMU object, the cell-locator service (tracking_service_ctor) and the state-machine App (tracking_service_app_ctor); runs until shutdown then tears down and logs main.cpp:32 WARN 'TrackingService shut down'.
named_functions.0x0010af70: cell_locator_ctor  // CellLocator::CellLocator(IMQTTClient&, Movement&, lambda). Stores mqtt client (self+0x18) and movement ref (self+0x20), allocates 0xb0-byte state, subscribes 'modem/location/cellular' -> cell_locator_on_location, spawns cell_locator_poll_thread (handle @ self+0x90). Renamed from the prompt's mislabel tracking_service_ctor; RTTI typeinfo _ZN11CellLocator confirms the class.
named_functions.0x0010b410: cell_locator_on_location  // MQTT handler for 'modem/location/cellular'. json::dump()s the inbound cellular fix and logs cell_locator.cpp:39 WARN 'Modem - cellular location : %s'. Pure observer; no re-publish, no location estimate, no MCC/MNC/LAC/CID processing (that payload is built by the modem service).
named_functions.0x0010b6d0: cell_locator_poll_thread  // Cellular polling loop. Maps packed tracking-type (self+0xd0) to interval minutes (0x1_00000002->2, 0x2_00000002->30, 0x2_00000001->240, else->5 @ self+0xa0), requests a fix via modem client vtable+0xc8, waits interval*60000 ms on a cv (self+0xa8), honoring run flag self+0x98 / stop flag self+0x88.
named_functions.0x0010b8d0: cell_locator_poll_thread_invoke  // std::thread trampoline that invokes cell_locator_poll_thread (calls *(state+0x10 vtable+0x10)). Compiler-emitted thread plumbing, not hand-written app logic.
named_functions.0x0010b9c0: cell_locator_poll_thread_state_dtor  // Deleter/dtor for the poll-thread _State object (sets vtable PTR_LAB_00156b68, frees 0x20 bytes). Compiler-emitted std::thread plumbing.

named_functions.0x00111df0: movement_ctor  // Movement::Movement(IMQTTClient&) — builds the IMU-detection object, subscribes "ux/tracking/alarm/imu/triggered", binds moving/stationary listeners, arms 30-min (1800000 ms) revert timer. Called from tracking_main.
named_functions.0x00112060: movement_set_stationary  // Movement::setState(Stationary): obj+0xa0:=2, notifies listeners. Bound as the 30-min timer expiry callback (no-motion revert).
named_functions.0x001121e0: movement_set_moving  // Movement::setState(kMoving): obj+0xa0:=1, debounced (no-op if already moving), notifies listeners. Bound as the IMU-trigger callback.
named_functions.0x00112380: movement_dtor  // Movement::~Movement() — stops timer, unsubscribes the IMU topic, frees listener list. Called from tracking_main on shutdown.

named_functions.0x001127e0: movement_listener_list_copy  // Copies/assigns the listener deque (resizes map, rehashes). std::deque plumbing (vendor).

(renamed from FUN_00112bc0)
named_functions.0x00112de0: tracking_service_app_delete  // Deleting destructor: tracking_service_app_dtor(self) then operator delete(self, 0x160). (renamed from FUN_00112de0)
named_functions.0x00112e10: tracking_service_app_ctor  // App constructor. Stores mqtt_client(self+0xc)/state_client(self+0xd), inits the command deque (self+0x70..) and json map, subscribes the 4 MQTT topics with their invoker/manager std::function pairs, spawns tracking_service_command_thread. Vtable PTR_FUN_001572b8. (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00113350: tracking_service_play_alarm_sound  // Publishes MQTT 'ux/sound/play' (topic @0x13a780) with the alarm sound name from DAT_0015a978 (non-retained). Invoked for SMS locate command (code 2). (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00113810: tracking_service_set_state  // Central state mutator. No-op if unchanged; logs tracking_service.cpp:123 'To tracking state : %s'; StateClient::setState (+0x10); if publish!=0 publishes retained MQTT tracking/state (IMQTTClient +0x20) + flush (+0x40); structured key ng_state. (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00113d20: tracking_service_on_alarm_state  // MQTT handler 'ux/alarm/state' (IMU/movement trigger). When the json value==3 (int/uint/double==3.0) and current state != THEFT(2), calls set_state(AUTO=1, publish=1) -> arms tracking. (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00113e30: tracking_service_command_thread  // Command worker draining the SMS/command deque (cv self+0x120, run-flag self+0x158). Dispatch: 1->set_state(OFF=0), 0->set_state(THEFT=2), 2->play_alarm_sound, other->log :106 'Unknown message'; empty pop->log :91 'Popped message is empty.'. (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00114130: tracking_service_on_tracking_state  // MQTT handler 'tracking/state': restores the retained boot state, logs tracking_service.cpp:31 'Retrieved tracking state from mqtt_broker: %s', calls set_state(restored, publish=0). (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00114240: tracking_service_on_modem_info  // MQTT handler 'modem/info/device': stringifies the json payload (json::dump) and logs tracking_service.cpp:40 'Modem info device: %s'. (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00114300: tracking_service_on_sms  // MQTT handler 'modem/sms': logs tracking_service.cpp:47 'New sms: %s'; sms_message_parse -> int command code; pushes the code onto the command deque (self+0x70.., under mutex self+0xc0) and notifies the worker cv (self+0x120). (pre-named, verified)
named_functions.0x00115d50: sms_message_parse  // Parses inbound SMS JSON (from 'modem/sms') into a command code: object key 'tracking' value == 'enabled' -> 0, == 'disabled' -> 1, else / missing / parse-error -> 0xFFFFFFFF (logs sms_message.cpp:37 INFO 'Could not parse sms message : %s'). Returns int to tracking_service_on_sms, which pushes it on the command deque. Does NOT return 2.
named_functions.0x00123890: tracking_state_to_string  // Maps the tracking-state enum to a string: 0=OFF, 1=AUTO, 2=THEFT, other='INVALID' (strings @0x13ba88). Used by set_state/on_tracking_state for logging. (pre-named, verified)
